    G

    GAME_OVER_BACKGROUND_COLOR - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    GAME_OVER_BUTTON_COLOR - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    GameManager - Klasse in boardLogic
    Manages the game flow, including player turns, moves, and game state.
    GameManager() - Konstruktor für Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Private constructor to enforce singleton pattern.
    GameManager.LossCause - Enum-Klasse in boardLogic
    Represents the various causes by which a player can lose the game.
    gameMode - Variable in Klasse persistance.GameStateData
     
    gameOver() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Gets called when a loss condition gets fulfilled.
    GameOverPhase - Klasse in phases
    Represents the game over phase in the game.
    GameOverPhase(PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse phases.GameOverPhase
    Constructor for GameOverPhase.
    GamePersistenceManager - Klasse in persistance
    Manages the persistence of game states by saving and loading game data to and from JSON files.
    GamePersistenceManager() - Konstruktor für Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
     
    GamePhase - Klasse in phases
    This class represents the abstract base class for different gamePhases.
    GamePhase(PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse phases.GamePhase
    Constructor for GamePhase.
    gamePrompt - Statische Variable in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
     
    GameStateData - Klasse in persistance
    Represents a snapshot of the game state at a particular moment.
    GameStateData(PlayerData, PlayerData, boolean, List<MoveData>, List<MoveData>, int, int, int, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse persistance.GameStateData
    Creates a new GameStateData capturing the current game state.
    gameStatus - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    gameThread - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    getAllPossibleMoves() - Methode in Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
    Returns a list of all possible moves for this player.
    getAllPossibleRemovals(PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
    Returns a list of all possible removals for the opponent.
    getBoard() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Retrieves the current game board, represented as a mapping of node IDs to Node instances.
    getBoardSnapshot() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the snapshot of the board when this move was made.
    getCurrentIsWhite() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns whether it is currently the white player's turn.
    getCurrentPlayer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Getter for the player that is currently able to perform a move.
    getDifficulty() - Methode in Klasse players.CPUPlayer
    Retrieves the difficulty strategy currently assigned to the CPU player.
    getGameStatus() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Getter for the current status of the game.
    getID() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Getter for the node's ID.
    getInstance() - Statische Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Creates a new Instance of this Manager, if there is none already.
    getInstance() - Statische Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Returns the singleton instance of GameManager.
    getInstance() - Statische Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Creates a new Instance of this Manager, if there is none already.
    getInstance() - Statische Methode in Klasse view.GUI
    Creates a new Instance of this Manager, if there is none already.
    getMoveInput(boolean) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Helpermethod for GameManager.runGame().
    getName() - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Getter for the players name.
    getNeighbors() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Getter for the list containing all neighbor nodes.
    getNode() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Stone
    Getter for the node the stone currently is placed on.
    getNode(int) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Retrieves the Node object associated with the specified ID from the game board.
    getNoMillTurnCounter() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Getter for the amount of turns that no mill was formed.
    getNoMillTurnCounter() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the number of turns without a formed mill at the time of this move.
    getOpponent() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Getter for the player that is not currently able to perform a move.
    getOwner() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Stone
    Getter for the owner of the stone.
    getPhase() - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Getter for the current phase the player is in.
    getPhaseBlack() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the game phase for the black player at the time of this move.
    getPhaseWhite() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the game phase for the white player at the time of this move.
    getPlacedStones() - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Getter for the number of stones that have been placed by the player.
    getPlacedStonesBlack() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the number of stones the black player has already placed.
    getPlacedStonesWhite() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the number of stones the white player has already placed.
    getPlayerBlack() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    getPlayerWhite() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    getRedoMoves() - Methode in Klasse persistance.History
    Getter for the redo moves stack.
    getRemainingStones() - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Getter for the list containing all the players remaining stones.
    getRemoveInput(boolean) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Helpermethod for GameManager.runGame()
    getRemoveMode() - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Returns the current state of the remove mode.
    getRingNodes(int) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Retrieves a list of Node objects that belong to the same ring as the specified node.
    getStone() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Getter for the node's stone.
    getTimeLeft() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
    Getter for the remaining thinking time.
    getTimeLeft() - Methode in Klasse persistance.Move
    Returns the time left for the move in seconds.
    getUndoMoves() - Methode in Klasse persistance.History
    Getter for the undo moves stack.
    GUI - Klasse in view
    This class represents the main GUI of the game.
    GUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.GUI
    Initializes the GUI.
    guiBoard - Statische Variable in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
     
    GUIBoard - Klasse in view
    This class is responsible for rendering and managing the graphical representation of the game board in a Nine Men's Morris game.
    GUIBoard() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    guiManager - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    guiManager - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUIPrompt
     
    GUIPrompt - Klasse in view
    This class is responsible for updating the GUI prompts based on the current game state.
